lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Hi there. How can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: I'm just a fur trader. I come across from the city most days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you a hunter too?

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Oh no, that life isn't for me. I'm just a tailor.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: What's brought you out here anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just exploring.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Oh, enjoy yourself then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to work with the guild.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: That's exciting! I expect I'll be turning some furs into clothes for you soon then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That depends on how much I manage to catch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you sell anything?

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Why yes I do. Here's what I have available.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you do much with animal furs?

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Of course! Why don't you take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make some armour for me?

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: I can indeed. What would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mixed hide top.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Here you go. Enjoy it.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: You don't have the required items for me to make a mixed hide top for you. You need 20,000 coins and two sunlight antelope fur.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Some mixed hide legs.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Here you go. Enjoy it.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: You don't have the required items for me to make some mixed hide legs for you. You need 20,000 coins and three fox fur.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Some mixed hide boots.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Here you go. Enjoy it.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: You don't have the required items for me to make some mixed hide boots for you. You need 17,500 coins and one sunlight antelope fur

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mixed hide cape.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Here you go. Enjoy it.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: You don't have the required items for me to make a mixed hide cape for you. You need 20,000 coins and one jaguar fur.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: Pellem
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.
